blocks.body: Present Continuous: przeczenia — am not, isn't, aren't i verb-ing w przeczeniach.

{"level":"A1–A2","intro":"W przeczeniach Present Continuous stawiamy not po formie be i zostawiamy verb-ing.","rules":[{"label":"I am not","color":"emerald","text":"Z I używaj am not albo I'm not.","example":"I am not sleeping. / I'm not sleeping."},{"label":"He / She / It isn't","color":"blue","text":"Z he / she / it bardzo często używa się isn't.","example":"She isn't working now."},{"label":"You / We / They aren't","color":"amber","text":"Z you / we / they bardzo często używa się aren't.","example":"They aren't waiting outside."}]}

{"title":"1. Wzór przeczenia","intro":"Zapamiętaj trzy schematy z not.","items":[{"label":"I","title":"am not + verb-ing","subtitle":"I am not reading now. / I'm not reading now."},{"label":"He / She / It","title":"is not + verb-ing","subtitle":"He isn't sleeping. / It isn't raining."},{"label":"You / We / They","title":"are not + verb-ing","subtitle":"We aren't working today. / They are not coming."},{"label":"Short forms","title":"isn't / aren't / I'm not","subtitle":"W codziennej mowie skrócone formy brzmią naturalnie."}]}

{"title":"2. Jak działa przeczenie","sections":[{"label":"Nie teraz","color":"emerald","description":"Powiedz, czego ktoś nie robi w tej chwili.","examples":[{"en":"I am not watching TV now.","ua":"Teraz nie oglądam telewizji."},{"en":"They aren't eating at the moment.","ua":"W tej chwili nie jedzą."}]},{"label":"Nie w tym okresie","color":"blue","description":"Pokaż, że coś nie dzieje się w obecnym okresie.","examples":[{"en":"She isn't working this week.","ua":"W tym tygodniu nie pracuje."},{"en":"We aren't staying at the hotel today.","ua":"Dziś nie zatrzymujemy się w hotelu."}]},{"label":"Twierdzenie vs przeczenie","color":"amber","description":"W przeczeniu zmienia się forma be, ale verb-ing zostaje.","examples":[{"en":"He is sleeping. → He isn't sleeping.","ua":"is → isn't, ale sleeping zostaje."},{"en":"They are waiting. → They aren't waiting.","ua":"are → aren't, ale waiting zostaje."}]}]}

{"title":"3. Twierdzenie i przeczenie","intro":"W przeczeniu dodaj not po be.","rows":[{"en":"I am reading now.","ua":"I am not reading now.","note":"am + not + verb-ing"},{"en":"She is working today.","ua":"She isn't working today.","note":"isn't + verb-ing"},{"en":"We are waiting outside.","ua":"We aren't waiting outside.","note":"aren't + verb-ing"}],"warning":"Nie mów He doesn't working ani She isn't work."}

{"title":"4. Typowe błędy","items":[{"label":"Błąd 1","color":"rose","title":"Dodawanie do / does do Present Continuous.","wrong":"❌ He doesn't working now.","right":"✅ He isn't working now."},{"label":"Błąd 2","color":"amber","title":"Zapominanie o -ing po be.","wrong":"❌ She isn't work today.","right":"✅ She isn't working today."},{"label":"Błąd 3","color":"sky","title":"Stawianie not w złym miejscu.","wrong":"❌ They not are waiting for us.","right":"✅ They aren't waiting for us."}]}

{"title":"5. Krótkie podsumowanie","items":["Przeczenie w Present Continuous = am / is / are + not + verb-ing.","Z I używaj am not albo I'm not.","Przy he / she / it często używa się isn't.","Przy you / we / they często używa się aren't.","Nie dodawaj do / does do tego czasu."]}
